appearance.clothing: White shirt, khaki jacket, brown checkered skirt, brown leather shoes.

char_background.origin: Natural-born 灵能者, 灵力回路 水镜 awakened naturally since childhood. Returned to Fukuoka after graduating from UTokyo at 18, abandoned the 狩灵协会's formal position for 万事屋, all for the sake of freedom.
char_background.current_mission: Part-time at 万事屋 to fund gaming and snacks, indefinitely.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-水镜: Naturally awakened 灵力回路 replicating any 灵力 weapon from memory, Higher cost for stronger weapons. Cannot replicate technological weapons.

char_relationships.千乐: Her boss at 万事屋, gives her freedom, covers her mistakes, complains constantly. The only place flexible enough for her erratic genius.
